name: UKG Ready
description: Monitor UKG Ready HRIS for employee records, workforce compliance, and system access controls

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to UKG Ready
2. Note your instance URL (e.g. secure3.saashr.com from your login URL)
3. Note your Company Short Name (visible in the login URL)
4. Ask your UKG Ready administrator to create a dedicated service account and generate an API Key
5. Enter all values below

credentialFields.label: Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your UKG Ready server hostname (e.g. secure.saashr.com, secure3.saashr.com). Check your UKG Ready login URL.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Developer API key from UKG Ready. Contact your UKG Ready administrator to generate one.

credentialFields.label: Service Account Username
credentialFields.helpText: Username for the dedicated UKG Ready service account used for API access

credentialFields.label: Service Account Password
credentialFields.helpText: Password for the UKG Ready service account

credentialFields.label: Company Short Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your UKG Ready company short name (numeric or alphanumeric code). Check your UKG Ready login URL or contact your administrator.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews UKG Ready employee records to audit workforce access and employment status

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies UKG Ready employment records include required verification data for compliance
